body:
APPROVE
Test directly exercises the structural keying claim from the bead description: it drives real `RecordRouteAttempt` calls and reads back via `routeMetricSignals`, asserting both directions of isolation (failures on X don't pollute Y; success on Y doesn't reset X). Tight, focused ~50 LOC addition matching the bead scope.

Test directly exercises the structural keying claim from the bead description: it drives real `RecordRouteAttempt` calls and reads back via `routeMetricSignals`, asserting both directions of isolation (failures on X don't pollute Y; success on Y doesn't reset X).
